---
title: "translate-abs"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{translate-abs}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(plate2N)
```

# **TO DO**

## introduce example data (tidy_plates, tidy_table, failed_wells_example)

## failed_wells_template()

## remove_wells()

## qc_raw_abs()

## extract_std_blanc() (& extract_std_data()?)

## correct_std_blank()
